zh.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire於大約1090年出生在英國。她於1115年與Ralph de Eyncourt在英國結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1165年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾瑟爾加頓享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire于大约1090年出生在英国。她于1115年与Ralph de Eyncourt在英国结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1165年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾瑟爾加頓享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basilie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Pedro, Domingo, Roberto, Carlos, Ricardo, Albertino, Alejandro, Almario, Altagracia, Andres, Armando.  Portuguese Ilidio.  Italian Antonio, Gennaro, Anastasio, Federico, Marco, Quirino.
Italian; Portuguese (Basílio): from the personal name Basilio, Basílio, from Latin Basilius (see Basil ).

variants.name: Basil
meanings: From the Greek name Basileios ‘royal’ (a derivative of basileus ‘king’). This name was borne by St Basil the Great ( c.330–379 ), bishop of Caesarea, a theologian regarded as one of the Fathers of the Eastern Church. It was also the name of several early saints martyred in the East.

variants.name: Bacilio
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Peru): variant spelling of   Basilio  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire was born about 1090, in England. She married Ralph de Eyncourt in 1115, in England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 1165, in Thurgarton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire est née environ 1090, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Ralph d’Eyncourt en 1115, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1165, à Thurgarton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire wurde um 1090 in England geboren. Sie hat 1115 in England Ralph de Eyncourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1165 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Thurgarton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire è nata il circa 1090 nel England. Lei sposato Ralph de Eyncourt nel 1115, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1165, nel Thurgarton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshireは約1090年にイギリスで生まれた。1115年にイギリスでRalph de Eyncourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1165年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスウルガートンで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire(은)는 대략 1090년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1115년 영국에서 Ralph de Eyncourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스르가턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Eyncourt em 1115, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1165, em Thurgarton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire родилась около 1090 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Eyncourt в 1115 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1165 г. в местности тургартон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Basilie of Nottinghamshire nació aproximadamente 1090, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Ralph de Eyncourt en 1115, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1165, en Thurgarton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
